title: Basic Select
instruction: Send "one" to ch1. Use select to receive from ch1 or ch2 and print the result.

title: Non-Blocking with Default
instruction: Use select with case <-ch and default that prints "no data available".

title: Timeout Pattern
instruction: Use select to receive from result OR time.After(50ms). Slow sends after 200ms so timeout fires first; print "timeout: operation took too long".
hint: case <-time.After(50 * time.Millisecond): fmt.Println("timeout: operation took too long")

title: Done Channel Pattern
instruction: Start counter(done) goroutine. After 100ms close(done) to stop it.

title: Fan-In: Merging Channels
instruction: Complete merge: start two goroutines calling forward(ch1) and forward(ch2).
